content:
{
  "name": "docomator",
  "version": "0.1.0-alpha.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Offline-first AI-assisted document automation platform for DOCX and XLSX.",
  "type": "module",
  "workspaces": [
    "apps/*",
    "packages/*"
  ],
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=24.18.0",
    "npm": ">=11"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "clean": "node scripts/ci/clean.mjs",
    "build": "npm run build -w @docomator/contracts && npm run build -w @docomator/config && npm run build -w @docomator/api && npm run build -w @docomator/worker",
    "test": "npm run test -w @docomator/contracts && npm run test -w @docomator/config && npm run test -w @docomator/api && npm run test -w @docomator/worker && node --test scripts/runtime/*.test.mjs",
    "check:docs": "node scripts/ci/check-doc-links.mjs",
    "check:shell": "bash scripts/ci/validate-shell.sh",
    "check": "npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test && npm run check:docs && npm run check:shell",
    "start:api": "node apps/api/dist/server.js",
    "start:worker": "node apps/worker/dist/main.js",
    "migrate": "node scripts/runtime/migrate.mjs",
    "bundle:offline": "bash scripts/offline/prepare-bundle.sh",
    "bundle:verify": "bash scripts/offline/verify-bundle.sh",
    "bundle:smoke": "bash scripts/offline/smoke-test.sh"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "24.10.9",
    "typescript": "7.0.2"
  }
}
